impact: After T-001 landed, `git status` shows three untracked tool artifacts on every invocation: `reviews.db` (codex-bridge local cache), `.story/sessions/` (per-session autonomous guide state), `.story/status.json` (auto-generated status cache). None of these should be committed. Each future ticket will repeat the clutter and risk accidental `git add -A`.
resolution: Resolved in the T-001 commit by adding `reviews.db`, `.story/sessions/`, `.story/status.json` to `.gitignore` under a "Local tool artifacts" section.
title: Add local tool artifacts to .gitignore (reviews.db, .story/sessions/, .story/status.json)
